systemic_low_risk_field_equation.strength_term: A_sys_field = mix(S_sys_band_score, R_sys_band, 1 - P_sys_band, M_brain_direct_v31, R_train_v37)
systemic_low_risk_field_equation.learning_term: L_sys_field = mix(L_sys_band, S_sys_band_score, D_feature_v31, B_plastic_v37, R_train_v37)
systemic_low_risk_field_equation.system_term: M_sys_field = A_sys_field + S_sys_field + R_sys_field + L_sys_field - P_sys_field

project_readout.summary: systemic low-risk field extension validation checks whether the coherent low-risk band starts extending into a more connected low-risk field instead of remaining a narrow band.
project_readout.next_question: next verify whether this low-risk field still survives after it is folded into the next brain direct chain and training bridge.
